raw_transcript: Not necessarily. We might need to optimize your medication. I'll check your Humira trough levels and antibodies to see if your body is clearing the drug too fast. We'll also check a fecal calprotectin.
final_corrected_note: Not necessarily. We might need to optimize your medication. I'll check your Humira trough levels and antibodies to see if your body is clearing the drug too fast. We'll also check a fecal calprotectin.
